final:
// // This module is designed to capture the last value of data_in whenever enable is deasserted.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    input [31:0] data_in,
    output reg [31:0] data_out
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
        data_out <= 0;
    end else if (enable) begin
        data_out <= data_in;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module is designed to capture the last value of data_in whenever enable is deasserted.
